sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales_data (sales_person String, region String, total_sales Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY sales_person;
INSERT INTO sales_data (sales_person, region, total_sales) VALUES ('Alice', 'North', 12000), ('Bob', 'South', 8000), ('Charlie', 'West', 15000);
SELECT region, SUM(total_sales) AS region_sales FROM sales_data GROUP BY region HAVING region_sales > 10000;
UPDATE sales_data SET total_sales = total_sales * 1.1 WHERE sales_person = 'Bob';
SELECT sales_person, AVG(total_sales) AS avg_sales FROM sales_data GROUP BY sales_person HAVING avg_sales > 5000;
